2605.25814.title: Adaptive Graph Refinement and Label Propagation with LLMs for Cost-Effective Entity Resolution
2605.25814.paper_summary: Dirty entity resolution (ER), which identifies records referring to the same real-world entity from a single, messy dataset, is a fundamental task in data management and mining. However, the dominant blocking-matching-clustering paradigm for ER suffers from critical flaws. Its cascaded, decoupled workflow essentially produces a static, sparse graph plagued by missing edges (due to blocking failures) and noisy links (due to matching errors), causing error propagation and yielding suboptimal clusters, particularly when rigid transitivity is imposed in the clustering. We contend that matching and clustering are fundamentally synergistic, both optimizing for the construction of an ideal entity graph. Building upon this insight, we propose Alper, a unified framework that integrates these steps into an iterative probabilistic label propagation process over a global, evolving graph. Unlike disjoint blocking, Alper refines the graph structure and labels dynamically by adaptively integrating "weak but cheap" signals from graph propagation with "strong but expensive" LLM-based pairwise queries. For higher cost-effectiveness, we formulate the signal selection as a constrained optimization problem maximizing cumulative marginal gain under a query budget, solved via our greedy algorithm with provable theoretical guarantees. Our extensive experiments over eight benchmark datasets demonstrate that Alper is consistently superior to state-of-the-art cascaded pipelines.
2605.25814.paper_summary_zh: 髒亂的實體解析（ER），即從單一雜亂的數據集中識別指向同一現實世界實體的記錄，是數據管理和挖掘中的一項基本任務。<lb/>然而，主導的阻塞-匹配-聚類範式在ER中存在關鍵缺陷。<lb/>其級聯的、解耦的工作流程本質上產生了一個靜態的、稀疏的圖，受到缺失邊（由於阻塞失敗）和噪聲連結（由於匹配錯誤）的困擾，導致錯誤傳播並產生次優聚類，特別是在聚類中強加剛性傳遞性時。<lb/>我們主張，匹配和聚類在根本上是協同的，兩者都在優化理想實體圖的構建。<lb/>基於這一見解，我們提出了Alper，一個統一框架，將這些步驟整合為一個在全局、演變圖上的迭代概率標籤傳播過程。<lb/>與不相交的阻塞不同，Alper通過自適應地將來自圖傳播的“弱但便宜”的信號與“強但昂貴”的基於LLM的成對查詢整合，動態地改進圖結構和標籤。<lb/>為了提高成本效益，我們將信號選擇公式化為一個約束優化問題，最大化在查詢預算下的累積邊際收益，通過我們的貪婪算法解決，並具有可證明的理論保證。<lb/>我們在八個基準數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，Alper在性能上始終優於最先進的級聯管道。
2605.25814.author: Hongtao Wang et.al.
2605.25814.authors: Hongtao Wang, Renchi Yang, Haoran Zheng, Xiangyu Ke
